text: Our Equity Research desk has published their latest deep-dive analysis on the UK semiconductor sector, covering supply-chain dynamics, end-market demand trends, and 12-month price targets for key FTSE-listed names.

Surrey Capital Research hosted a panel discussion featuring alumni now working at Goldman Sachs, Barclays, and Citadel. Over 80 students attended to learn about pathways into equity research and quantitative finance.

We're excited to announce that applications for the 2025–26 analyst cohort are now open across all four research desks. Join a team producing institutional-grade financial research from the University of Surrey.
